GeneralDescription.SourceString: Friend of the trees. Most of them, anyway.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: Friend of the trees. Most of them, anyway.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: The island's favourite lumberjack is concerned about this 'Chrome' stuff. These kids with their fancy-shmancy living metal. What happened to good old traditional wood? Hmph.
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: The island's favourite lumberjack is concerned about this 'Chrome' stuff. These kids with their fancy-shmancy living metal. What happened to good old traditional wood? Hmph.
